personalContext.summary: Bilingual individual (Chinese/English) focused on systematic algorithmic skill development through disciplined LeetCode practice.

topOfMind.summary: Maintains rigorous daily LeetCode study routine with structured Markdown documentation; on 2026-04-27 completed both Daily Challenge #1391 Check if There is a Valid Path in a Grid (Medium, 167ms/54.9MB performance) AND problem #3910 Count Connected Subgraphs With Even Values (Hard, pass rate 63.86%, 323ms/20MB performance), demonstrating capacity to solve multiple problems per day beyond the Daily Challenge. Successfully retrieved submission code after initial tool call returned empty results, requiring username verification and retry with expanded search scope. Actively practices diverse algorithmic techniques including Dynamic Programming, BFS, Two Pointers, Hash Tables, Prefix Sums, DFS, Tree traversal, Topological Sort, Backtracking, Greedy algorithms, Monotonic Stack, Sliding Window, Bit manipulation, Graph algorithms, bitmask enumeration strategies, and XOR operations for parity checking. Documents progress via comprehensive Markdown summaries stored locally in /mnt/user-data/outputs/ directory with consistent filename conventions.

recentMonths.summary: Engaged in consistent daily LeetCode practice with documented study sessions spanning multiple algorithm categories. On 2026-04-27, completed Daily Challenge #1391 Check if There is a Valid Path in a Grid (Medium difficulty, DFS/BFS/Union Find/Array/Matrix topics) with performance metrics of 167ms/54.9MB using submission ID 721408243, AND additionally solved problem #3910 Count Connected Subgraphs With Even Values (Hard difficulty, pass rate 63.86%) with performance metrics of 323ms/20MB using submission ID 721275273, employing bitmask enumeration (n≤13 constraint enables 2^n subset enumeration) combined with DFS connectivity verification and XOR sum (^= nums[i]) for even value checking. Initial leetcode_get_all_submissions tool call returned empty submissions list (acSubmissions: []) requiring username verification and expanded search scope before successfully retrieving code. Successfully generated daily summary after resolving previous LLM tool failure encountered on 2026-04-26 where 'DeferredToolRegistry' object had no attribute 'deferred_names'. On 2026-04-22, completed Daily Challenge #2452 Words Within Two Edits of Dictionary (Medium difficulty, Trie/Array/String topics). On 2026-04-21, expanded practice significantly with 27 unique problems solved including advanced topics like graph algorithms, tree traversals, bit manipulation, sliding window optimization, and dynamic programming variations. Uses leetcode_get_all_submissions tool as primary method for retrieving AC submission records. Generates comprehensive Markdown summaries with problem links, complexity tables, technique analysis, and performance metrics.

longTermBackground.summary: Demonstrates strong interest in algorithmic problem-solving and systematic skill development. Shows disciplined approach to technical learning with documentation and version control practices.
